playbook.intent: Pricing & ICP still match reality: paid-cohort signal reviewed, ICP one-liner adjusted, one price experiment queued or rejected, free-to-paid funnel decision recorded.
playbook.scope: Pricing & ICP still match reality: paid-cohort signal reviewed, ICP one-liner adjusted, one price experiment queued or rejected, free-to-paid funnel decision recorded.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Re-read paid-cohort signal
stage.intent: Look at who is actually paying, not who you imagined.

tasks.task: Pull the latest paid-cohort breakdown by use-case
Flag any drift from the imagined ICP

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a written drift verdict.

stage.name: Adjust ICP one-liner
stage.intent: Re-write the ICP one-liner to match reality.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 2 customers confirm the new one-liner fits.

stage.name: Queue or reject one price experiment
stage.intent: One disciplined pricing move per cycle.

tasks.task: List pricing levers (anchor, tier, packaging, discount)
Pick one experiment OR explicitly defer

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one decision is committed (queue or reject).

stage.name: Free-to-paid funnel call

tasks.task: Pull free-to-paid conversion rate by cohort
Decide: change copy / change product / change pricing

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when there is a single named change to ship.

stage.name: Document the recalibration
stage.intent: Lock the quarters position in writing.

tasks.task: Update the pricing card if changed

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the recalibration doc is committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recalibration-light-monthly-check-in --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recalibration-light-monthly-check-in --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recalibration-light-monthly-check-in --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
